classifications.subject: Frontier post-training recipe review with Finbarr Timbers
classifications.reason: Deep-dive podcast on frontier model post-training recipes (RLHF, DPO, reward modeling) with Finbarr Timbers (ex-DeepMind, Midjourney). Directly relevant to LLM training/post-training concepts and entity pages.

classifications.subject: RL Systems Mind the Gap: Matching Trainer and Generator Throughput
classifications.reason: SemiAnalysis deep technical analysis on RL training infrastructure — matching trainer and generator throughput. Directly relevant to training infrastructure, RL systems, and GPU cluster optimization concepts.

classifications.subject: [AINews] GLM-5.2: the top Frontend Coding model in the world, IndexShare for Speculative Decoding
classifications.reason: New model release: GLM-5.2 (Zhipu AI) claims top frontend coding benchmark. IndexShare is a new speculative decoding technique. Both are directly wiki-relevant as model and inference concept updates.

classifications.subject: Bye bye Fable
classifications.reason: Ben's Bites covering Fable (AI interactive storytelling/video) shutdown or major change. AI industry product news — relevant for tracking AI company lifecycle but not a core wiki topic.

classifications.subject: Leviathan Waking
classifications.reason: AI policy/governance essay by Dean W Ball (Hyperdimensional). Likely about state power and AI governance. Relevant to AI safety/policy concepts but more editorial/opinion than technical.

classifications.subject: 💸 OpenAI Burned Billions in 2025 - and no end in sight
classifications.reason: OpenAI financial burn rate analysis. Relevant for OpenAI entity page (business/financial context) but all links are beehiiv tracking URLs — harder to scrape. Business/finance angle rather than technical.
